curation.synopsis: Imperial-Fists recruitment-and-training novel. The Imperial Fists, descending on a backwater planet whose technology has slipped back to roughly civil-war-era infrastructure and which has fallen out of contact with the wider Imperium, harvest some two thousand candidates from three rival nations locked in a long planetary war. Three of those candidates — Zatori, du Queste, and Taloc, drawn from opposing sides of that same local war — survive the brutal recruitment regime and progress together through the chapter's Scout-stage formation, each carrying nationally-coded grievances against the other two even as the Imperial Fists' indoctrination tries to weld them into battle-brothers. Their first deployment as fully-formed Neophytes is to Vernailis, a planet under Chaos blight, where they fight alongside their senior battle-brothers against the Roaring Blades Traitor Guard, a Chaos-corrupted Imperial Guard host. Coming-of-age / Bildungsroman structure across three POV recruits; opens what was projected as an Imperial-Fists scout trilogy.
